UV_WarpedObelisk.Label: obelisk core
UV_WarpedObelisk.Description: A mysterious obelisk core has crashed into the grav ship and rapidly corrupted the GravEngine. The obelisk hums with putrid psychic energy, gradually intensifying as it approaches some dangerous limit. You can send colonists to suppress the obelisk to prevent it from activating. You can also mark the obelisk for study to try to learn its purpose and perhaps make use of it. You can always attack the obelisk to destroy it, but doing so may unleash unnatural and dangerous phenomena. Dlc collaboration - Void universe
UV_WarpedObelisk.DisabledReason: Auto-disabled: Mod event (enable manually if desired)
